visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a gray flat cap is speaking directly to the camera. He is wearing a green sweatshirt with white lettering and is gesturing with his hands. The background is a soft-focus studio setting with warm lighting. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a hand holding a smartphone. The screen displays the iPhone settings menu. A finger scrolls through the list and taps on the 'Photos' entry. The desk environment is visible in the background. (3) Within the Photos settings on the smartphone, the finger taps to select the 'Keep Originals' option. The lighting is bright and clear on the screen. (4) The visual transitions to the Photos app showing a high-resolution image of a Corgi dog lying on a bed with pink linens. The user taps the share icon. (5) A share options overlay appears on the screen. The user selects 'Options' and toggles the 'All Photos Data' switch to the green 'on' position. (6) The man returns to the frame, smiling and pointing towards the camera as large text overlays appear. The studio lighting remains consistent.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: @3ctim. [Slogan]: 為什麼我用 AirDrop. (2) [Variety]: 畫質怪怪的!. (3) [Slogan]: 那是因為你. (4) [Slogan]: 沒有做. (5) [Subtitle]: 首先呢 點開. (6) [Subtitle]: 設定 > 照片. (7) [Subtitle]: 最下面的選擇. (8) [Subtitle]: 保留原始檔. (9) [Subtitle]: 回到相簿以後 按分享 > 選項. (10) [Subtitle]: 所有照片資料 打開. (11) [Subtitle]: 這個時候 你就可以得到. (12) [Slogan]: 100% 原味照片啦!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting a tutorial.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a green sweatshirt, and a light gray flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Alternates between a blurred studio background with soft lighting and a high-definition screen capture of an iPhone interface.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A vibrant male voice begins speaking in an upbeat, instructional tone. Simultaneously, a rhythmic electronic pop background track with a prominent synth bassline and drum machine beat starts at a moderate volume. (2) A short, bright digital 'ping' sound effect occurs as the speaker transitions to the first step of the tutorial. The music continues without interruption. (3) The speaker's delivery becomes faster and more enunciated during the menu navigation description. The background music maintains a consistent energy level. (4) A soft digital 'click' sound is heard, indicating a screen interaction. The vocal remains the primary focus with high clarity. (5) The narration reaches a high-arousal conclusion, with the speaker sounding enthusiastic. The background music swells slightly and then fades abruptly as the speech ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step-by-step Tutorial -> Result Verification
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick and efficient tech tip for iPhone users to maintain the highest quality of photos when sharing via AirDrop. It solves a common pain point of compressed image quality through specific settings adjustments.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Tutorial content focusing on software features rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density text overlay and rapid cuts common in social media short-form content to maintain viewer engagement during a technical tutorial.
